description: Provider error responses (401, 403, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504) all map to 404 NotFoundException

scenarios.description: Provider returning 401 Unauthorized maps to 404 NotFoundException
Provider returning 403 Forbidden maps to 404 NotFoundException
Provider returning 429 Too Many Requests maps to 404 NotFoundException
Provider returning 500 Internal Server Error maps to 404 NotFoundException
Provider returning 502 Bad Gateway maps to 404 NotFoundException
Provider returning 503 Service Unavailable maps to 404 NotFoundException
Provider returning 504 Gateway Timeout maps to 404 NotFoundException

notes: When the NodeBB users provider returns any error (4xx/5xx) with null data, the usecase maps it to a NotFoundException. This verifies the error mapping regression for all provider failure modes.
